abilities.name: speed-boost
abilities.shortEffect: Raises Speed one stage after each turn.
abilities.effect: This Pokémon's Speed rises one stage after each turn.
abilities.flavorText: The Pokémon's Speed stat is boosted every turn.

abilities.name: tinted-lens
abilities.shortEffect: Doubles damage inflicted with not-very-effective moves.
abilities.effect: This Pokémon deals twice as much damage with moves that are not very effective against the target.
abilities.flavorText: The Pokémon can use “not very effective” moves to deal regular damage.

abilities.name: frisk
abilities.shortEffect: Reveals an opponent's held item upon entering battle.
abilities.effect: When this Pokémon enters battle, it reveals an opposing Pokémon's held item to all participating trainers. In a double battle, if one opponent has an item, this Pokémon will Frisk that Pokémon; if both have an item, it will Frisk one at random.
abilities.flavorText: When it enters a battle, the Pokémon can check an opposing Pokémon's held item.
